calendar.matters:
Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Common Interest Development
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: STEVEN S. WEIL, ESQ., 925.838.2090, FOR PETITIONER SAN FRANCISCO BARCELONA HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION.
JOHN H. CORCORAN, ESQ., 415.935.1285, FOR OTHER PARTY ECKHARD EVERS.
ALSO PRESENT IN COURT IS DAVID MACIAS, PRESIDENT, ST. VINCENT DE PAUL SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK the Petition To Authorize Approval Of Amended And Restated Declaration Of Common Interest Development UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
